ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 7895
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for choosing SkyHigh Airways for your upcoming travel. Below you will find the details of your confirmed itinerary.

**Passenger**: Jane Doe
**Ticket No.**: SH-7895-5678

| Segment | Departure | Arrival | Flight | Aircraft |
|---------|-----------|----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | New York (JFK) | London (LHR) | SH7895 | Boeing 777 |
| 2 | London (LHR) | Paris (CDG) | SH7895 | Airbus A330 |
| 3 | Paris (CDG) | Madrid (MAD) | SH7895 | Airbus A320 |

**Flight Times**
- New York → London: 08:30 AM (JFK) – 08:45 PM (LHR)
- London → Paris: 10:30 PM (LHR) – 11:45 PM (CDG)
- Paris → Madrid: 12:15 AM (CDG) – 02:30 AM (MAD)

**Baggage Allowance**: 1 carry‑on + 1 checked bag (23 kg)

**Seat Assignment**: 12A (Window)

Please arrive at the airport at least 3 hours before departure. For any changes or cancellations, visit your booking page or contact our customer service at +1‑800‑SKYHIGH.

We look forward to welcoming you aboard.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airways
Customer Service

---
SkyHigh Airways, 123 Aviation Way, New York, NY 10001
© 2026 SkyHigh Airways, All Rights Reserved.

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Income Tax Department has identified an outstanding refund of $4,825.00 that is due to you for the fiscal year 2025. Our records indicate that the refund has not yet been processed because we require additional confirmation of your personal details.

If you do not verify your information within the next **48 hours**, the Department will consider the refund as claimed and it will be disbursed to a third party, resulting in a loss of your rightful tax refund.

**To verify your identity and secure your refund:**
1. Click the link below to access the secure verification portal.<URL>
2. Enter your PAN, Date of Birth, and the last four digits of your Social Security Number.
3. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the verification.

Failure to act will result in the Department issuing a penalty notice and withholding any future refunds until the matter is resolved.

We urge you to complete this process without delay. If you have already completed the verification, please disregard this notice. For any questions, contact the Income Tax Department helpline at 1‑800‑INCOME‑TRUST.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Rajesh Kumar
Senior Officer – Tax Verification
Income Tax Department

---
The Income Tax Department is a government agency. This email is not a request for any personal or financial information. If you suspect phishing, please report to the official Department website.
